studyName: The MD Anderson Colorectal Cancer Case Control Study

tables.description: This sample attributes data table contains body site, analyte type, tumor status, histological type, primary metastatic tumor status, primary tumor location, and 1st though 10th principal components as covariates in principal component analysis (PCA).

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Analyte Type

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL_TYPE
variables.description: Cell or tissue type or subtype of sample

variables.name: IS_TUMOR
variables.description: Tumor status

variables.name: PC1
variables.description: The 1st principal component in PCA as covariate

variables.name: PC10
variables.description: The 10th principal component in PCA as covariate

variables.name: PC2
variables.description: The 2nd principal component in PCA as covariate

variables.name: PC3
variables.description: The 3rd principal component in PCA as covariate

variables.name: PC4
variables.description: The 4th principal component in PCA as covariate

variables.name: PC5
variables.description: The 5th principal component in PCA as covariate

variables.name: PC6
variables.description: The 6th principal component in PCA as covariate

variables.name: PC7
variables.description: The 7th principal component in PCA as covariate

variables.name: PC8
variables.description: The 8th principal component in PCA as covariate

variables.name: PC9
variables.description: The 9th principal component in PCA as covariate

variables.name: PRIMARY_METASTATIC_TUMOR
variables.description: Primary tumor, metastasis, or transformed cell line

variables.name: PRIMARY_TUMOR_LOCATION
variables.description: Primary tumor location

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

tables.description: This subject phenotypes data table contains case control status of subject for colorectal cancer, reported race and ethnicity, ancestry inferred via genetic data, and family history of colorectal cancer.

variables.name: AFFECTION_STATUS
variables.description: Case control status of the subject for colorectal cancer

variables.name: FAMILY_HISTORY_OF_CRC
variables.description: 1st or 2nd degree relative with a family history of colorectal cancer

variables.name: GENETICALLY_INFERRED_ ANCESTRY
variables.description: Ancestry inferred by PCA using genetic data

variables.name: RACE_AND_ETHNICITY
variables.description: Reported race and ethnicity

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

tables.description: This subject consent data table contains subject IDs, consent group information, and biological sex.

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

variables.name: SEX
variables.description: Sex inferred using genetic data

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

tables.description: This subject sample mapping data table includes a mapping of study subject IDs to sample IDs. Samples are the final preps submitted for genotyping, sequencing, and/or expression data. For example, if one patient (subject ID) gave one sample, and that sample was processed differently to generate 2 sequencing runs, there would be two rows, both using the same subject ID, but having 2 unique sample IDs.

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID
